# Fardeen NB Portfolio

> Semantic index of Fardeen NB's AI research, publications, open-source projects, and professional background.

Fardeen NB is an AI Scientist, Deep Learning Researcher, and Tech Entrepreneur specializing in pre-training and post-training large language models (LLMs) from scratch, transformer architectures, and model compression.

## Details & Sections
- [Biography](https://fardeen.net/#about): Overview of Fardeen's journey from co-founding FX Pattern Pro at 18 to research on transformer mechanics.
- [Work Experience](https://fardeen.net/#work): Career history including Insight Hospital (Full Stack AI Engineer), Accenture (AI Engineer), FX Pattern Pro (AI Co-founder), SAP, and Infosys.
- [Pretrained LLM](https://fardeen.net/#model): Technical specifications of the Neutrino-Instruct-7B language model.
- [Publications & Research](https://fardeen.net/#scholar): Citations and research index on transformer models, long-range dependencies, and emergent reasoning.

## Verified Links
